title: Jindal Steel & Power is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jindal Steel & Power is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
